# Parameter record: <parameter name>

- Parameter ID:
- Symbol:
- Model/version:
- Status: Measured / Inferred / Hypothesized / Fitted / Derived / Numerical
- Review state and reviewer:
- Last review:

## Value

- Nominal value:
- Unit:
- Internal SI representation:
- Valid range/support:
- Distribution or bounded uncertainty:
- Correlations/joint distribution:

## Definition

Define exactly what is measured or modeled, including sign, basis
(molar/mass/volume/surface), standard state, and tensor/component conventions.

## Source

- Full citation/dataset:
- DOI or persistent ID:
- Exact table/figure/equation/method location:
- Primary or secondary:
- Data file and checksum if retained:

## Applicability

- Temperature:
- Pressure:
- pH/activity convention:
- Ionic strength/composition:
- Phase:
- Mineral/catalyst:
- Spatial/time scale:
- Species/sequence range:

## Extraction and transformation

Record digitization, unit conversion, fitting, interpolation, extrapolation, and
code/version. Include equations in GitHub-compatible LaTeX.

## Uncertainty

Separate reported measurement uncertainty, extraction error, between-study
variation, extrapolation/model-form uncertainty, and chosen prior uncertainty.

## Validation and cross-checks

Independent sources, limiting cases, dimensions, and test links.

## Sensitivity and impact

Which observables or conclusions depend materially on this value?

## Conflicting evidence

Record alternatives and why they are not averaged or selected.

## License and credit

Data/software reuse terms and required attribution.

## Notes and open questions
